name: python3-jira
title: python3-jira
description:
JIRA Python library (Python 3)
This package contains a library that eases the use of the JIRA REST API
from Python.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use jirashell because JIRA Python library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use jirashell as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jirashell [options] [args]` as documented upstream for jirashell.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair jirashell with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `jirashell --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
